title: Things on 10/14-15/2022
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir comes home unannounced after 4+ weeks away; finds Dad mid-psychosis episode, lola neglected, insurance and electricity bills past due over $500 each
  • emilio was emotionally checked out — Yahir interprets it as the same avoidance pattern he's catalogued before; resolves to talk to him before leaving
  • Dad recants his lifelong "killed god" Nietzsche stance — kneels begging God to end his life — first religious-regret moment Yahir has ever witnessed from him
  • Yahir is handed loose papers titled as "Dad's history," partially burns them in a backyard fire to symbolize end of Dad's marriage attachment, secretly salvages half to read later — discovers the "mi engaño" backstory is Mom's infertility and a $40K fertility spend in 2008
  • Pink Floyd "warm my bones up by the fire" inversion: Dad's fire sears, Mom's TQM sticky notes warm — Yahir cries hard at Mom's house and decides he wants the TQM tattooed
  • Captures the numbness as strength pattern: emotional block in dad-crisis = rational clarity = reach

Notes

A four-page burst written at 2am the night Yahir surprised his family by coming home from OSU. The visit becomes the most documented Dad episode in the vault: alcoholism, psychosis, suicidality, and a pseudo-ritual fire-burning in the backyard. The papers Dad hands him are Dad's manifesto — half-charred and partially salvaged, they reveal that the mi engaño ("she deceived me") refrain Yahir grew up with traces back to Mom's infertility and a $40K fertility-treatment spend in 2008, the year Dad also lost the house.

The piece is also one of Yahir's clearest articulations of the numbness as strength mechanism: a "physical and mental block" in his brain stem during dad-crises that lets him stay rational, lie strategically (he tells Dad that Fabian is now homeless and no longer OSIG president to make the "change is the only constant" point land), and sustain pressure. The Pink Floyd inversion — Dad's fire sears, Mom's TQM sticky notes warm — is the mom house mission's emotional source code, written down here for the first time.

Connects to: 2019 10 31 maya on where father went wrong, 2022 07 18 why mom maya jann brenda dad, 2022 01 07 failure is terrifying and humiliating it means not fittting.
